archimate:Value.name: Delivery Capacity
archimate:Value.documentation:
Definition: The Delivery Capacity Value ABB refers to the ability of public administrations to deliver public services, programs, and policies effectively and efficiently to citizens and stakeholders. It encompasses the overall performance, effectiveness, and responsiveness of public administration in meeting the needs and expectations of the public.
Source: Public Administration Reform: A Comparative Analysis
Interoperability Dimension: Governance IoP
Viewpoint: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DeliveryCapacityValue
ABB name: eira:DeliveryCapacityValue
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DeliveryCapacityValue
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: The Delivery Capacity Value ABB refers to the ability of public administrations to deliver public services, programs, and policies effectively and efficiently to citizens and stakeholders. It encompasses the overall performance, effectiveness, and responsiveness of public administration in meeting the needs and expectations of the public.
Public Administration Reform: A Comparative Analysis
Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
